raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija Josuiis Weh-
stus/ kas uś to Telti tezzeja/ un
raugi/ tas bija apslehpts winna
Telti/ un tas Sudrabs tur ap-
pafscha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nehme tahs Leetas
no tahs Telts Widdus/un atneffe
tahs pee Josuiis/ un pee wiﬀeem
Israëta Behrneem/ un isbehre
tahs ta KUNGA Preekschâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Josuiits un
wiſs Israëls ar winnu/ Akau/
Serus Dehtu/ un to Sudrabu/
un to Mehteli/ un to Selta Meh-
li/ un winna Dehlus/ un winna
Meitas/un winna Wehrſchus/un
winna Ehſetus/un winna sihkus
Lohpus/ un winna Telti / un
wiſs/ kas tam bija/ un wedde tohs
us Akora Eeleiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josuiis fazzija: Ka tu
muhs eſti apbehdtinajte/ ta apbeh-
dinahs tew tas KUNGS tcho-
deën/ un wiſs Israëls nomehtaja
to ar Akmixeem/ un fadedsinaja
tohs ar Ugguni/ un uhsfrakwe
pahr teem Akmixus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee uhsezhle pahr teem
weenu leelu Akmixo-Rohpu/ kas
lihds schodeen (paleek)/ ta atgree-
sahs tas KUNGS no ta Karstu-
ma tawas Bahrsibas/tadeht tohp
tahs Weetas Wahrs notanfts ta
Celeeja Afors/ lihds schai paschai
Deenat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad fazzija tas KUNG
us Josuii: Ne bihstee
un ne bailojees/ nem
ar tewim wiﬀus Karra-Wihrus
un zelleeg prett Aju/redf/es efim
to Rehnixu no Ajas/ un winna
Lauidis/ un winna Pilsfahtn/u
winna Seini tawâ Rohkâ deviś
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tev buhs Ajai/un winna
Rehnixam darriht/ itt ka tu Je-
rikum/ un winna Rehnixam dar-
rijs eſti/ bes ween/ ka jums win-
nas Lauptjumu/ un winnas Loh-
pus preekſch fewim nemt buhs
leez Zittus fleppeni turretees ni-
Pilsfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Josuiis/un wi-
fi Karra-Wihri ka tee us Aju eetu/
un Josuiis islaſtija trihsdefmite-
tuhkſtoſchus spehzigus un stipru-
Wihrus/un isfuhtija toheNakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pawehleja teem fazz-
dams: Peeraugajt/ jums buhs
pretti to Pilsfahtu fleppeni turre-
tees ais Pilsfahta/ ne turrajtees
wiﬀai tahți noPilsfahta/un effect
wiﬀee gattawi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es tad/ un wiſi tee Lau-
dis/ kas pee man irr/ pee-eeﬁm
pee Pilsfahta/ un kad tee iseeg
nuus pretti/ itt ka pirmoreis/
tad behgfim mehs preekſch win-
xeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tee tad ahra nahf
nuus pakak/ teekams mehs
tohs no Pilsfahta favrup jchfiz-
ram/ jo tee fazzijhs: winni behg
muhsu Preekschâ/ itt ka pirmaf/
tad
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
